subcodes.first_line: He hath declared: We beseech God, blessed and exalted be He, that He may reform [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرمودند نسئل الله تبارک و تعالی ان یصلح
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
